data.title: US stocks lower; Fed's preferred inflation index surges, hitting 2.6% in July from a year earlier, above 2% target.
data.description: US stocks traded lower on Friday, with Nasdaq Composite falling over 0.4%. The Dow traded down 0.22% to 45,537.65, Nasdaq fell 0.44% to 21,610.49, and S&P 500 dropped 0.24% to 6,486.33. Energy sector rose by 0.3% while technology stocks fell by 0.8%. Inflation rate soared to 2.6% from a year earlier, meeting expectations, as per the US Bureau of Economic Analysis. This surge raises doubts on the timing of Jerome Powell's expected interest rate cuts. More details on Benzinga.com.
New York Federal Reserve Accepts Full $77.898 Billion of Submitted Funds to Reverse Repo Facility on August 29

data.title: John Malone, a key figure in modern media for 50 years, reflects on his impact in "Born to Be Wired."
data.description: Over the past 50 years, John Malone has played a significant role in shaping the modern media industry. In his recent memoir titled "Born to Be Wired," he reflects on his contributions and the impact he has had. This memoir delves into Malone's influence in transforming the media landscape and highlights the key milestones of his impressive career. Throughout his journey, Malone has been instrumental in revolutionizing the industry and his memoir provides a unique insight into the evolution of media.

data.title: Elon Musk's AI "mothership" may revolutionize technology, as per James Altucher's presentation.
data.description: A recent presentation by James Altucher introduced Elon Musk's ambitious AI project referred to as the "mothership." This project is envisioned to revolutionize the technology landscape with its massive scale and potential impact on the future.

data.title: Pacsun brings fall fashion to college campuses with multi-city campus tour starting August 30th.
data.description: Pacsun, a leading fashion brand among Gen Z, is dominating the back-to-school period by offering trendy styles directly to college campuses across the country. Starting on August 30, the brand is initiating its college series and will be part of the gameday buzz. This initiative is positioning Pacsun to connect with a large audience of college students and capitalize on the lucrative back-to-school market.

data.title: NBA® 2K26 Superstar and Leave No Doubt Editions now out on Early Access for PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam. Other editions available on Sept 5, 2025.
data.description: 2K has revealed the launch of NBA® 2K26 Superstar Edition and Leave No Doubt* Edition. These editions are now available for Early Access on PlayStation®5 (PS5®), Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam. Other editions like the Standard Edition and WNBA Edition (exclusive to GameStop in the U.S.) will be released globally on September 5, 2025, for PS5, PlayStation®4 (PS4®), Xbox Series X|S, and Xbox.

data.title: VeChain (VET) falls by 6%, trading at $0.02 after dropping 5.97%, with RSI of 48 indicating neutral trends.
data.description: The price of VET is currently at $0.02, showing a decline of 5.97%. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 48, indicating a period of sideways consolidation expected for traders of VeChain.

data.title: Safe Bulkers, Inc. will sell a 2006-built Kamsarmax class vessel, MV Pedhoulas Merchant, for $11.5 million in September 2025.
data.description: In Monaco on August 12, 2025, Safe Bulkers, Inc. revealed a significant business development. The international maritime firm disclosed a deal involving the sale of MV Pedhoulas Merchant, which is a dry-bulk vessel falling under the Kamsarmax class and originally constructed in Japan in 2006. The agreed-upon gross sale price for this transaction stands at $11.5 million, with the anticipated delivery scheduled for September 2025. This move marks an important strategic decision for the Company, underscoring its ongoing operations in the marine drybulk transportation sector.

data.title: Iren stock surges 26% on beating earnings, becoming "preferred partner" of Nvidia.
data.description: Iren's stock rose significantly following its report of better-than-expected earnings and announcement of becoming a "preferred partner" of Nvidia. The Bitcoin mining and AI data center company saw a surge of 26% in its stock value. This partnership with Nvidia signifies a positive development for Iren, highlighting its growth potential in the technology sector.

data.title: Tokenized alt funds surge by 47% to $1.7B in 30 days. Ethereum dominates at $1B, over half the market value.
data.description: The institutional alternative funds market, which includes tokenized assets, is dominated by Ethereum with a total value exceeding $1 billion. This represents over 50% of the total market value for such funds.

data.title: Financial regulatory issue in crypto gains relevance for lawmakers facing competitive 2026 midterms.
data.description: Lawmakers in the upcoming 2026 midterm elections are now faced with a pressing financial regulatory matter that was previously obscure. This issue has gained significance, especially for those in tight races, prompting swift action and attention from those involved.

data.title: South Africa's Wholesale and Retail Trade in Construction and Building Materials Industry Report 2025 highlights ecommerce growth, climate-resilient materials, and infrastructure investment. Includes data on sales, key suppliers, retailers, number of stores, notable players, and environmental concerns.
data.description: A new report titled "Wholesale and Retail Trade in Construction and Building Materials Industry in South Africa 2025" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com offerings. The report provides insights into the wholesale and retail trade sector of construction and building materials in South Africa, covering sales data, key suppliers, retailers, number of stores, major industry players, and corporate developments. Additionally, the report delves into environmental concerns, technological advancements, innovation trends, and infrastructure investments in the industry.

data.title: Dow surges 800 points, hitting all-time high due to rate-cut hopes by Federal Reserve; Nvidia earnings ahead.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index reached a record high, surging by 800 points as investor optimism grew regarding a potential rate cut at the September Federal Reserve meeting. This increase comes amidst anticipation surrounding Nvidia's upcoming earnings report. The positive market performance was further supported by reassurances from Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell.

data.title: Investors abandon lawsuit over Bitcoin profitability claims, alleging Strategy misled about accounting changes impacting company's massive holdings.
data.description: The class action lawsuit claimed that Strategy had deceived investors regarding the effects of a recent accounting method on the company's substantial Bitcoin holdings, impacting its overall profitability.

data.title: PepsiCo acquires $585 million in Celsius stock, increasing stake to 11%, boosting company's energy and stock market value.
data.description: In a recent agreement, PepsiCo purchased $585 million of newly issued convertible stock, increasing its ownership in Celsius to 11%. This deal has given Celsius a significant boost, as detailed in a recent report from Investor's Business Daily.
